gradient.$description: Nebula light-mode gradient tokens. Primary and accent gradients are identical to dark mode; surface gradients use opaque lavender, periwinkle and mint pastel tints for visibility on bright white surfaces.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — same as dark: vibrant purple to periwinkle blue.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — same as dark: primary shade to teal green.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — soft lavender to periwinkle pastel. Visible and harmonious on white surfaces.

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary — deeper lavender tint range for primary-accented containers.

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent — mint to sky tint for accent-accented containers.
